textbook: 人教版 PEP 英语五年级上册

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: 'funny' 的意思是'有趣的；滑稽的'。
questions.explanation: funny 是形容词，意为有趣的，滑稽的。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: 'strict' 的意思是'温和的'。
questions.explanation: strict 的意思是严格的，温和的是 kind。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认特征的一般疑问句
questions.question: 当回答 'Is he polite?' 时，可以用 'Yes, he is.'
questions.explanation: Is he...? 的肯定回答是 Yes, he is.

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母y在词尾的发音
questions.question: 单词 'baby' 和 'happy' 中字母 y 的发音是相同的。
questions.explanation: 在这些单词中，末尾的 y 都发 /i/ 的音。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: 'hard-working' 的对应词是 'lazy'。
questions.explanation: hard-working 是努力的，其反义词是 lazy（懒惰的）。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: My sister is very ______. She always says 'hello' to teachers.
questions.explanation: 对老师说你好体现了有礼貌，故选 polite。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问人物特征的特殊疑问句
questions.question: — ______ is your music teacher? — Mr Young.
questions.explanation: 回答是人名，询问人物用 Who。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问人物特征的特殊疑问句
questions.question: — What's she like? — ______
questions.explanation: What is ... like? 用于询问性格或外貌特征。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: Wu Binbin is ______. He can solve difficult math problems.
questions.explanation: 能解数学难题说明聪明，选 clever。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认特征的一般疑问句
questions.question: — Is she quiet? — ______
questions.explanation: 一般疑问句否定回答主谓必须一致且使用否定形式。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: Sarah is very _____. She doesn't talk much in class.
questions.explanation: 不爱说话对应 quiet。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认特征的一般疑问句
questions.question: — Is your father strict? — Yes, ______ very strict.
questions.explanation: father 是男性，缩写 he's。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: Ms Wang is our new teacher. She is ______, not young.
questions.explanation: not young 的反义词是 old。

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母y在词尾的发音
questions.question: Which word has the same 'y' sound as 'sunny'?
questions.explanation: sunny 和 candy 的 y 都发 /i/，其余三个发 /ai/。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问人物特征的特殊疑问句
questions.question: — ______ — He is tall and strong.
questions.explanation: 描述外貌身材需要用 What's he like 提问。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: Oliver is a helpful student. He is very _____-working.
questions.explanation: hard-working 是固定词汇，意为勤奋的。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问人物特征的特殊疑问句
questions.question: ______ is your English teacher? Mr Smith is.
questions.explanation: 询问谁是老师用 who。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认特征的一般疑问句
questions.question: — Is he funny? — No, he ______.
questions.explanation: is not 的缩写，此处填 isnt 符合小写要求。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: Our head teacher is very ______. She never gets angry.
questions.explanation: 不生气说明很亲切温柔，填 kind。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: 将下列形容词与其对应的汉语意思连线。
questions.explanation: polite-有礼貌, clever-聪明, strict-严厉, quiet-安静。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: 将下列单词及其对应词/反义词意思连线。
questions.explanation: 词义一一对应：old-老的, kind-亲切的, funny-滑稽的, thin-瘦的。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问人物特征的特殊疑问句
questions.question: 连词成句：like, he, What, is, ?
questions.explanation: 句首大写，询问人的特征句型：What is he like?

questions.knowledge_point: 确认特征的一般疑问句
questions.question: 连词成句：Is, kind, she, ?
questions.explanation: 一般疑问句结构：Be动词+主语+形容词？

exam.title: 五年级上册第一单元月考真题卷

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: 英语单词 'kind' 的意思是'善良的'。
questions.explanation: kind 译为善良的、亲切的。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: 'young' 的反义词是 'new'。
questions.explanation: young 的反义词是 old。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认特征的一般疑问句
questions.question: 回答 'Is Mr Jones funny?' 只能用 'Yes, she is.'
questions.explanation: Mr Jones 是男性，回答应该用 he。

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母y在词尾的发音
questions.question: 单词 'sunny', 'windy' 结尾的 y 都发 /i/。
questions.explanation: 在多音节单词词尾，y 常发短音 /i/。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问人物特征的特殊疑问句
questions.question: 'What's he like?' 是问他的长相或性格。
questions.explanation: like 在此句中作为介词，询问某人处于什么品质或状态。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: Ms Jones is very ______. She can do many things.
questions.explanation: 会做很多事情体现了聪明。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问人物特征的特殊疑问句
questions.question: — Who's your PE teacher? — ______
questions.explanation: Who 引导的疑问句回答特定的某人。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认特征的一般疑问句
questions.question: — Is Ms Wang funny? — No, ______. she is very strict.
questions.explanation: Ms Wang 是女性，排除 he；后文说她严肃，说明前面是否定回答。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: He is very ______. He always helps me with English.
questions.explanation: 乐于助人选 helpful。

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母y在词尾的发音
questions.question: Which word has a different 'y' sound?
questions.explanation: shy 发 /ai/，其他三个发 /i/。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问人物特征的特殊疑问句
questions.question: — ______ is your head teacher? — He is kind.
questions.explanation: What is ... like? 省略了 like 时，常问的是身份或概括。但标准课本中 What's ... like? 完整问性格。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: The boy is very ______. He finishes his homework every day.
questions.explanation: 按时完成作业说明勤奋。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认特征的一般疑问句
questions.question: — ______ they helpful? — Yes, they are.
questions.explanation: 主语是 they，be动词用 are。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: Robin is a robot. He is ______ but he isn't ______.
questions.explanation: 根据 PEP 五上 Unit 1 对 Robin 的描述，他是 kind 的，但不 strict。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问人物特征的特殊疑问句
questions.question: — Who is your music teacher? — ______
questions.explanation: 询问谁是老师，回答身份/姓名。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: Sarah never speaks in public. She's very ______.
questions.explanation: 害羞的对应词是 shy。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问人物特征的特殊疑问句
questions.question: What's your friend ______? He is quiet.
questions.explanation: 问性格特征固定句型 What is ... like?

questions.knowledge_point: 确认特征的一般疑问句
questions.question: — ______ she polite? — Yes, she is.
questions.explanation: she 对应的 be 动词是 is。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: Our PE teacher is not thin. He is ______.
questions.explanation: 不瘦的对应描写常是强壮的 strong。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: 将下列短语与中文意思配对。
questions.explanation: 词组配对，注意形容词修饰名词的对应关系。

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: 将下列反义词/对应词与其意思配对。
questions.explanation: 反义/对应关系：young-老的(意指反义词意思), active-安静的, strict-亲切的, tall-矮的。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问人物特征的特殊疑问句
questions.question: 连词成句：Is, your, funny, teacher, ?
questions.explanation: 一般疑问句：Be+形容词性物主代词+名词+形容词？

questions.knowledge_point: 性格与外貌特征词汇
questions.question: 连词成句：He, is, very, helpful, .
questions.explanation: 陈述句：主语+be+程度副词+形容词。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 描述人物特征的形容词及其反义词
knowledge_summary.key_formula: old (老) - young (少); kind (和蔼) - strict (严厉); funny (有趣的) - quiet (安静)
common_mistakes: 容易将 funny 误记为 fun (funny指滑稽有趣, fun指有趣)
knowledge_summary.tips: 可以通过成对记忆反义词来扩大词汇量。

knowledge_summary.point: What is he/she like? 句型
knowledge_summary.core_concept: 询问某人品质、性格或外貌特征的特殊疑问句
common_mistakes: 容易把 What's 误写成 Who's
knowledge_summary.tips: 回答通常是：He's/She's + 形容词。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 确认人物某一特征的询问方式
knowledge_summary.key_formula: Is he/she/it + 形容词? 回答：Yes, he is. / No, he isn't.
common_mistakes: 回答时人称代词 he/she 混乱
否定形式 isn't 拼写错误
knowledge_summary.tips: 一定要注意问句中的名字是男还是女，从而选择正确的 he 或 she。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: y 在双音节或多音节单词末尾的发音
knowledge_summary.key_formula: baby, happy, sunny, windy, candy 中末尾的 y 发 /i/
common_mistakes: 与单音节词末尾发 /ai/ 的 y 混淆 (如 my, fly, sky)
knowledge_summary.tips: 数一数单词中有几个音节，两个及以上的 y 通常发 /i/。
